source.format: iPhone recording, podcast-style rant with opinion and stories
source.tone: Educational but human. Teaching and proving with stories woven in — opinionated about databases and infrastructure.

cuts.name: hook
cuts.editorial_lens: Extract the single most surprising or provocative moment — a stat, a failure, a hot take. Must hook in the first frame.

cuts.name: tip
cuts.editorial_lens: Extract one standalone tip or 'did you know' — one concept, one takeaway, no setup needed.

cuts.name: problem_solution
cuts.editorial_lens: Pick a problem → solution → result segment. Should show a before/after or a demo with a visible outcome.

cuts.name: narrative
cuts.editorial_lens: Pick a fuller narrative arc — explainer with a hook, or an incident story with tension and resolution. Needs strong opening to survive drop-off.

cuts.name: full_segment
cuts.editorial_lens: Full deep-dive segment — complete tutorial or benchmark walkthrough. Only viable when retention data supports it.
